env_overlap_across_gear

charley

07/02/2022

Data loading

load("Circumpolar_Annotation_Env_Data.RData")

env_layer_names <- c("depth",
                     "slope",
                     "tpi",
                     "NPP_su_mean",
                     "seafloorcurrents",
                     "seafloortemperature",
                     "sst_su_mean",
                     "sst_su_sd",
                     "ice_su_mean",
                     "ice_su_sd",
                     "no3_mean",
                     "no3_sd",
                     "o2_mean",
                     "o2_sd",
                     "distance2canyons")

Data curation and Sample size

# Remove cells with no gear info available
data = cell_metadata_env[!is.na(cell_metadata_env$gear), ]
# Get sample size
sample_size = data %>% group_by(gear) %>% summarise(num=n())

Environmental variable distribution for each gear type

depth

slope

tpi

NPP_su_mean

seafloorcurrents

seafloortemperature

sst_su_mean

sst_su_sd

ice_su_mean

ice_su_sd

no3_mean

no3_sd

o2_mean

o2_sd
